name: vulnmcp
description: On-machine vulnerability detection and approval-gated remediation for Claude Desktop. macOS, Linux, Windows.
long_description: VulnMCP runs a local Trivy scan of your host, ranks the findings, and walks you through fixing them — showing the exact commands, rollback, and blast radius, and never changing anything without your explicit APPLY. No cloud, no background agent. Telemetry is opt-in and anonymous.

telemetry.title: Share anonymous usage stats
telemetry.description: Opt-in. Sends only aggregate counts/severities/durations (no CVE ids, package names, hostnames, or command output) to help improve VulnMCP. Off by default.

tools.name: scan_system
tools.description: Run a local Trivy scan and return structured CVE findings.

tools.name: triage_findings
tools.description: Rank findings by severity, CVSS, EPSS, and fixability.

tools.name: get_remediation_recipe
tools.description: Generate a safety-validated, executable remediation plan with a one-time approval token.

tools.name: apply_recipe
tools.description: Apply a recipe after explicit user approval. The trust boundary.
